subject: [PATCH v3 03/16] mm: rename uffd-wp PTE accessors to uffd

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch renames kernel-internal functions and variables related to the uffd-wp PTE bit, which is reused for marking access-tracking PTEs in addition to write protection. The renaming is mechanical and does not change behavior. The changes affect various architecture-specific header files, mm code, and userfaultfd code. The goal of this patch is to simplify the naming conventions and make it clear that the meaning of the uffd-wp bit depends on the VMA flag (WP or RWP).
